flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Garrett College are 19% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($35.8k vs $44.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Garrett College fell 31% between 2006 and 2009 (17.5% → 12.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Garrett College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (57.9% → 50.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Garrett College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (10.5% → 0.0%).
